## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally (or failures are pre-existing and noted above)
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated (README, ARCHITECTURE, inline comments)
- [ ] Conformance impact considered — new behavior covered by or exempt from `test/conformance`
- [ ] Security invariants preserved (see [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md) §Security invariants)

## DCO sign-off (required)

Every commit in this PR must carry a `Signed-off-by` line. CI enforces this.
Use `git commit -s` to add it automatically. If any commit is missing the
sign-off, rebase and re-sign before requesting review.

```
Signed-off-by: Your Name <your.email@example.com>
```
